| `seteuid` | sandbox model (accepted) |
| `setegid` | sandbox model (accepted) |
| `nanosleep` | 1-second resolution |
| `setitimer` | correct (no interval timers in sandbox) |
| `getitimer` | correct (no interval timers in sandbox) |
| `sysconf` | real values (ARG_MAX, CLK_TCK, NPROCESSORS, etc.) |
| `pathconf` | real values (NAME_MAX, PATH_MAX, PIPE_BUF, etc.) |
| `fpathconf` | delegates to pathconf |
| `tcsetattr` | accepted (single terminal mode) |
| `select` | basic impl (console fd) |
| `poll` | basic impl (sleep-based) |
| `epoll_create` | minimal (returns tracking fd) |
| `epoll_ctl` | minimal (accepts registrations) |
| `epoll_wait` | minimal (sleep-based polling) |
| `setjmp` | real aarch64 asm (src/arch/aarch64/setjmp.S) |
| `longjmp` | real aarch64 asm (src/arch/aarch64/setjmp.S) |
| `sigsetjmp` | real aarch64 asm (delegates to setjmp) |
| `siglongjmp` | real aarch64 asm (delegates to longjmp) |
| `regcomp` | stores pattern for regexec |
| `regexec` | basic regex (. * ^ $ literal) |
| `glob` | real glob via opendir + fnmatch |
| `fnmatch` | real wildcard matching (* ? literal) |
| `openlog` | routes to stderr with ident/priority |
| `syslog` | routes to stderr with ident/priority level |
| `closelog` | clears ident and facility |
| `wordexp` | word splitting with quote handling |

### Not Yet Implemented
Functions not present in any source file.

`pthread_create`, `pthread_join`, `pthread_detach`, `pthread_exit`, `pthread_mutex_init`, `pthread_mutex_lock`, `pthread_mutex_unlock`, `pthread_mutex_destroy`
`pthread_cond_init`, `pthread_cond_wait`, `pthread_cond_signal`, `pthread_cond_broadcast`, `pthread_rwlock_init`, `pthread_rwlock_rdlock`, `pthread_rwlock_wrlock`, `pthread_rwlock_unlock`
`pthread_key_create`, `pthread_setspecific`, `pthread_getspecific`, `sem_init`, `sem_wait`, `sem_post`, `sem_destroy`, `sem_open`
`sem_close`, `sem_unlink`, `dlopen`, `dlsym`, `dlclose`, `dlerror`

## Architecture Notes

- **Kernel**: seL4 microkernel with Microkit 2.1.0
- **Architecture**: AArch64 (Cortex-A53)
- **Process model**: Sandbox-based (no fork, use spawn)
- **Filesystem**: ext2 with full path resolution
- **Networking**: virtio-net with BSD socket API
- **No MMU page tables**: mmap uses malloc for MAP_ANONYMOUS
- **No dynamic linker**: all programs statically linked
- **No kernel threads**: pthreads not supported

## Recommendations

| Priority | Item | Rationale |
|----------|------|-----------|
| HIGH | Implement pthreads stubs | Many C libraries expect thread primitives |
| HIGH | Implement semaphore stubs | Required by concurrent programs |
| MED | Real sscanf/fscanf | Needed for text parsing |
| MED | Real setjmp/longjmp (asm) | Needed for error recovery |
| MED | ftruncate syscall | File management |
| LOW | Dynamic loading (dlopen) | Only needed for plugin systems |
| LOW | Real regex engine | Only needed for text processing |
